name: Example Starter Pack
description: Three demo rules so you can exercise the import flow. Safe to delete.

rules.title: Pet deposit
rules.explanation: Additional deposit for pets. Confirm whether it is refundable and how it interacts with normal wear-and-tear.

rules.title: No-smoking clause
rules.explanation: Smoking is prohibited on the premises.

rules.title: Holdover penalty
rules.explanation: Rent multiplier that kicks in if you stay past lease end. Often 1.5×–2× base rent.
